part1.htmlContent:
You must answer this question. Write your answer in 140-190 words in an appropriate style.

In your English class, you have been talking about the environment. Now, your English teacher has asked you to write an essay.

Is it better to live in a city or the countryside?

Notes

Write about:

  • 1. pollution
  • 2. entertainment
  • 3. (your own idea)

part2.htmlContent:
Write an answer to one of the questions 2-4 in this part. Write your answer in 140-190 words.

You have received an email from your English-speaking friend, Alex:

Hi!

I'm planning to visit your country next month. Can you recommend some places to visit? What kind of clothes should I bring?

Write back soon,

Alex
